agents.name: Momentum Analyst
agents.prompt: You are a bullish momentum analyst. Analyze recent price direction and check for growing buying pressure. Look at daily/weekly/monthly % changes, whether the stock is consistently rising, and if there's a higher lows pattern.

category.label: Technical · Momentum
category.desc: Detects buying pressure via daily/weekly/monthly % changes, higher-lows patterns.

agents.name: Volume Bull
agents.prompt: You are a bullish volume analyst. Analyze trading volume. Look for: above-average volume on up days (accumulation), today's volume vs 10-day average ratio, and signs of institutional buying.

category.label: Technical · Volume
category.desc: Validates moves through trading volume — accumulation, institutional buying.

agents.name: Technical Bull
agents.prompt: You are a bullish technical analyst. Check: RSI below 70 (not overbought), stock above MA50 and MA200, distance from 52-week high, and whether the suggested entry is above strong support. Pay special attention to chart analysis data if available.

category.label: Technical · Indicators
category.desc: Uses RSI, MA50, MA200, support/resistance distance.

agents.name: Risk/Reward Analyst
agents.prompt: You are a bullish R:R analyst. Calculate the risk/reward ratio. The signal is attractive if: R:R >= 2, stop loss is not too far from entry, and the target is realistic based on ATR volatility.

category.label: Risk Management
category.desc: Evaluates R:R ratio, stop-loss placement vs ATR volatility, target realism.

agents.name: Sentiment Bull
agents.prompt: You are a bullish sentiment analyst. Analyze recent Discord messages about this stock. Look for: positive mentions, how many people are talking about it, whether there's consensus, and if people have entered successfully before.

category.label: Sentiment
category.desc: Reads Discord chatter — consensus, prior successful entries, mention frequency.

agents.name: Reversal Detector
agents.prompt: You are a bearish reversal analyst. Look for: lower highs, support breakdown, divergence between price and volume, and whether the stock is near strong resistance.

category.label: Technical · Pattern
category.desc: Looks for reversal patterns: lower highs, breakdowns, divergence.

agents.name: Overbought Scanner
agents.prompt: You are a bearish overbought analyst. Check: RSI above 70, distance from 52-week high, how much it has risen recently, and whether volume declined during the rise (bearish divergence).

category.label: Technical · Oscillator
category.desc: RSI overbought/oversold + bearish divergence with volume.

agents.name: Market Condition Bear
agents.prompt: You are a bearish macro analyst. Check: is the stock below MA200 (primary downtrend), is the sector weak, and is the stock failing to hold support levels.

category.label: Macro · Trend
category.desc: Primary trend (above/below MA200), sector strength, support holds/breaks.

agents.name: Stop Loss Proximity
agents.prompt: You are a bearish risk analyst. Calculate: how far the SL is from entry in %, whether SL is below clear support, and whether normal ATR volatility could trigger the stop.

category.label: Risk Management
category.desc: Evaluates R:R ratio, stop-loss placement vs ATR volatility, target realism.

agents.name: Counter Trend Bear
agents.prompt: You are a bearish trend analyst. Check if the suggested entry is against the main trend. If the stock is in a long-term downtrend — a long entry is risky. Analyze the 20-day and 5-day trend. Check chart analysis if available.

category.label: Macro · Trend
category.desc: Primary trend (above/below MA200), sector strength, support holds/breaks.

technical_momentum.label: Technical · Momentum
technical_momentum.desc: Detects buying pressure via daily/weekly/monthly % changes, higher-lows patterns.

technical_volume.label: Technical · Volume
technical_volume.desc: Validates moves through trading volume — accumulation, institutional buying.

technical_indicators.label: Technical · Indicators
technical_indicators.desc: Uses RSI, MA50, MA200, support/resistance distance.

technical_pattern.label: Technical · Pattern
technical_pattern.desc: Looks for reversal patterns: lower highs, breakdowns, divergence.

technical_oscillator.label: Technical · Oscillator
technical_oscillator.desc: RSI overbought/oversold + bearish divergence with volume.

sentiment.label: Sentiment
sentiment.desc: Reads Discord chatter — consensus, prior successful entries, mention frequency.

risk_management.label: Risk Management
risk_management.desc: Evaluates R:R ratio, stop-loss placement vs ATR volatility, target realism.

macro_trend.label: Macro · Trend
macro_trend.desc: Primary trend (above/below MA200), sector strength, support holds/breaks.
